title: field
text: field A development object that represents a unit of data in an entity. It usually represents a column in a database table, but it can represent data that is not stored, such as a derived field or a control. Its associated properties define the way it is stored, displayed, and behaves. Related Links Fields A field is a unit of data in an entity. It usually represents a column in a database table, but it can model data that is not stored, such as a control or a derived field. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
